issue_title: style: fix Lessons Learned dark mode background
issue_body_preview:
## Problem
The Lessons Learned section had a light/washed-out background in dark mode:
- Outer container used `bg-violet-950/40` (40% opacity → blends with page background)
- Textarea and read-only div used `bg-background` which resolves to white

## Fix
- Outer: `dark:bg-violet-950` (full opacity)
test_description_zh: 在深色模式下，打开页面并导航至 Lessons Learned（经验教训）区域，观察该区域的外层容器背景颜色以及内部文本区域/只读区域的背景颜色，检查是否与深色模式整体风格一致。
expected_result_zh: 在深色模式下，Lessons Learned 区域的外层容器背景应为完全不透明的深紫色（violet-950），不会出现浅色/泛白的背景，与整体深色模式风格保持一致，无明显的颜色突兀或透出页面底色的情况。
